selections.name: Jambalaya
selections.reason: Draws the inside barrier and has been racing consistently well. Gets James McDonald aboard and maps perfectly to stalk the speed.

selections.name: Flightcrew
selections.reason: Has been setting the pace in recent starts and sticking on bravely. Zac Lloyd takes the ride and she will be in this for a long way.

selections.name: Audrey's Lane
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but has an excellent fresh record. Trialled well leading into this and represents value.

selections.name: Mailata
selections.reason: Underrated gelding who sprints well fresh. Has trialled nicely and can figure in the finish at odds.

danger_horse.name: Everyone's A Star
danger_horse.reason: Form is hard to fault and has a strong overall record, but the wide draw makes it tricky.

selections.name: Unleeshing
selections.reason: Classy mare who won well two starts back and wasn't disgraced in Group 3 company last time. Drops back in grade and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Tazima
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Gets James McDonald and a great draw to sit just off the pace.

selections.name: Iceman
selections.reason: Racing in great heart with a win and two placings from last three starts. Desperate for this trip and handles the rise in grade.

selections.name: The Western Front
selections.reason: Progressive type who won well last start. Steps up in class but has upside.

danger_horse.name: Nkosi
danger_horse.reason: Third-up and has won at this stage of the prep before. Forgive last run on slow ground.

selections.name: By Choice
selections.reason: Ran a strong 3rd in the G2 Sweet Embrace last start. Fitter now and has the tactical speed to take catching.

selections.name: Pembrey
selections.reason: Dominant debut winner before a forgivable run in the Sweet Embrace where she didn't get clear running. Can bounce back.

selections.name: Hardanger
selections.reason: Consistent filly who was 4th in the Sweet Embrace and 3rd in the Widden Stakes. Will be running on strongly.

selections.name: Ciaron's Star
selections.reason: Won well on debut before a solid 6th in the Sweet Embrace. Draws well and can improve.

danger_horse.name: Lumbini
danger_horse.reason: Has shown ability but disappointed last start. Can improve from the inside gate.

selections.name: Central Europe
selections.reason: Excellent debut when narrowly beaten in the G2 Skyline Stakes. Natural improvement makes him the clear top pick.

selections.name: Warwoven
selections.reason: Won well two back and solid 4th in the Skyline. Awkward draw but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Star Of Jamaica
selections.reason: Set the pace and fought on well for 3rd in the Skyline. Tough colt who will be in the finish.

selections.name: Euripedes
selections.reason: Solid 2nd on debut and has trialled well since. Open to improvement.

danger_horse.name: Forest King
danger_horse.reason: Won nicely on debut and draws perfectly to get a soft run.

selections.name: Wootton Verni
selections.reason: High-class import who was a strong 5th in the G1 Verry Elleegant last start. Ready to peak third-up at this distance.

selections.name: Soul Of Spain
selections.reason: Finished just ahead of Wootton Verni in the Verry Elleegant. Maps perfectly from the inside draw.

selections.name: Vauban
selections.reason: Elite stayer resuming. Has trialled well and can easily sprint well fresh over this trip.

selections.name: Just Fine
selections.reason: Solid second-up record and will strip fitter after his first-up run. Can control the pace.

danger_horse.name: Valiant King
danger_horse.reason: Group 3 winner last prep and will appreciate the step up in trip.

selections.name: Kerguelen
selections.reason: Returned with a brilliant win over this track and trip. Has excellent figures and can repeat despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Tonkin
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten by Kerguelen last start. Meets him better at the weights and will be right in the finish again.

selections.name: King's Secret
selections.reason: Resuming but has trialled very well. Won a Listed race before spelling and maps perfectly.

selections.name: Flying For Fun
selections.reason: Classy mare resuming. Won a Listed race here last prep and draws the inside.

danger_horse.name: Mal Coupe
danger_horse.reason: Chasing a hat-trick of wins and keeps raising the bar. Hard to ignore his winning form.

selections.name: Sixties
selections.reason: Standout 3yo who was a brave 3rd in the G1 Australian Guineas last start. Drops in grade and looks far too good for these.

selections.name: Panova
selections.reason: Ran a solid 6th in the G1 Surround Stakes. Fitter now and will appreciate this level of competition.

selections.name: West Of Swindon
selections.reason: Finished 6th in the Australian Guineas behind Sixties. Gets a great run from the draw.

selections.name: Shangri La Boy
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but previous form was excellent. Can bounce back here.

danger_horse.name: Federalist
danger_horse.reason: Caught the eye running on strongly first-up. Has stakes form from last prep.

selections.name: Savvy Hallie
selections.reason: In career-best form, narrowly beaten in the G1 Surround Stakes last start after winning the G2 Lightfinger. Ready to peak.

selections.name: Lazzura
selections.reason: Excellent return when 2nd in the G2 Millie Fox. Classy mare who will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Cinsault
selections.reason: Chasing four straight wins after taking out the Millie Fox. Must be respected on current form.

selections.name: Ole Dancer
selections.reason: Solid 3rd in the Surround Stakes. Building fitness and can figure in the multiples.

danger_horse.name: Verona Rose
danger_horse.reason: Won the G2 Guy Walter last start and gets a great map from the inside draw.

selections.name: Militarize
selections.reason: Top class galloper who was a solid 4th in the G3 Liverpool fresh. Will relish the step up in trip and draws the inside.

selections.name: Globe
selections.reason: Resuming. Won the G1 Caulfield Stakes last prep and flies fresh. Huge threat if he gets his own way in front.

selections.name: Lord Penman
selections.reason: Won well fresh over 7f here. Has plenty of upside and can measure up to this grade.

selections.name: Enxuto
selections.reason: Strong 2nd in the G2 Blamey last start. Rock hard fit and draws well.

danger_horse.name: Cristal Clear
danger_horse.reason: Underrated type who has trialled well and gets a soft run from the draw.

selections.name: Bandi's Boy
selections.reason: Drops significantly in grade after contesting stronger races. Ready to show his best in this company.

selections.name: Captain Furai
selections.reason: Won well last start over 6 1/2f here. Talented type who looks hard to hold out again.

selections.name: Sovereign Hill
selections.reason: Racing very consistently and only narrowly beaten last start. Wide draw is the only concern.

selections.name: Amreekiyah
selections.reason: Won well last start and gets the inside draw to do no work in the run.

danger_horse.name: Modella
danger_horse.reason: Solid 5th in the G2 Millie Fox last start. Drops in grade and draws well.
